title: fix(deps): update module github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface to v0.6.2 - autoclosed
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface) | require | patch | `v0.6.1` -> `v0.6.2` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface (github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface)</summary>

### [`v0.6.2`](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/releases/tag/v0.6.2)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2)

**Note:** This release switches to using the `tags.cncf.io` vanity URL for module name. Please replace `github.com/container-orchestrated-devices/container-device-interface` imports with `tags.cncf.io/container-device-interface`.

#### What's Changed

-   chore: import packages only once by [@​testwill](https://togithub.com/testwill) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/165](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/165)
-   fix: typo by [@​testwill](https://togithub.com/testwill) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/166](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/166)
-   cmd/validate: print the validation errors by [@​marquiz](https://togithub.com/marquiz) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/163](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/163)
-   cleanup: remove unused code by [@​bart0sh](https://togithub.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/168](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/168)
-   .github, Makefile: sanity workflow fixes, simplify mod-\* targets, bump golang to 1.19.x by [@​klihub](https://togithub.com/klihub) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/171](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/171)
-   make specs-go a module by [@​bart0sh](https://togithub.com/bart0sh) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/170](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/170)
-   Add version to spec-go dependency by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/173](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/173)
-   replaced incorrect link by [@​ATREAY](https://togithub.com/ATREAY) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/167](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/167)
-   Use tags.cncf.io URL in module names by [@​elezar](https://togithub.com/elezar) in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/172](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/172)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​testwill](https://togithub.com/testwill) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/165](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/165)
-   [@​marquiz](https://togithub.com/marquiz) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/163](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/163)
-   [@​ATREAY](https://togithub.com/ATREAY) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/167](https://togithub.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/pull/167)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/cncf-tags/container-device-interface/compare/v0.6.1...v0.6.2

</details>

---
